---
title: "Rohith Krishna"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/rohith-krishna-b6a2b711b
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/rohithkrishna99
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:tcrohithkrishna1999@gmail.com
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: CV
      href: cv/Rohith Krishna - Business Analyst.pdf
      target: _blank
---

## Hi, I'm Rohith {.unnumbered}

I'm a **Business Analyst with hands-on Product Management experience**, currently pursuing my MSc in Business Analytics at Dublin City University.

Over the past several years, I've worked as a **Business Analyst and Scrum Product Owner**, bridging the gap between business stakeholders and engineering teams — translating requirements into product roadmaps, owning backlogs, and delivering features that create measurable business value in Agile environments.

I'm now **combining my business analysis and product management background with deeper expertise in analytics, machine learning, and strategy management** through my MSc at DCU. My goal is to evolve into roles that sit at the intersection of data-driven decision-making and product strategy — where understanding users, designing solutions, and leveraging ML-powered insights come together.

This portfolio showcases my academic projects, technical capabilities, and the professional journey I'm building.
